title: Top US Diplomat Reveals Exactly Why Iran Was Attacked. 'They Boasted...'
summary_full: US-Israel attack on Iran was triggered by Tehran insisting on 'inalienable right to enrich nuclear fuel' and claiming it 'evaded oversight protocols' to amass 460kg  enough to build 11 nuclear bombs  Special Envoy Steve Witkoff told Fox News.
